a.title: IBM
a.body: IBM, International Business Machines Corporation, is a technology and consulting company nicknamed Big Blue. It is headquartered in Armonk, New York.

b.title: International Business Machines
b.body: International Business Machines, known as Big Blue, is a technology firm in Armonk, New York.

a.title: Apple Inc.
a.body: Apple Inc. is a technology company headquartered in Cupertino, California. It designs the iPhone, the Mac, and the iPad. Tim Cook is its chief executive officer.

b.title: Apple Records
b.body: Apple Records is a record label founded by the Beatles in 1968 in London. It released albums by the Beatles and James Taylor.

a.title: Mercury (planet)
a.body: Mercury is the smallest planet in the Solar System and the closest to the Sun. It has no natural satellites and a heavily cratered surface.

b.title: Mercury (element)
b.body: Mercury is a chemical element with the symbol Hg and atomic number 80. It is the only metal that is liquid at standard temperature and pressure.

a.title: Project Atlas
a.body: Project Atlas is an internal initiative.

b.title: Project Atlas
b.body: Project Atlas is a codename mentioned once in passing.
